annual_opex_per_miu_usd.rationale: Source-stated range $2-3M/MIU/yr; high extended to 3.5M to capture Risk 4 (20% OPEX escalation, $400-600k/MIU) flagged in Expert Criticism and Premortem.

capex_per_miu_usd.rationale: Source range $3-4M baseline per MIU; high extended to 4.5M to cover Risk 6 retrofit overrun ($450k-1M per unit) when vintage units lack compatible power/dimensions.

phase1_duration_years.rationale: Plan anchors Phase 2 gate at Month 18 (1.5y); spread reflects Issue 1 sensitivity flagging 50% R&D schedule overrun risk that pushes the Phase 1 operational window into year 2+.

ai_false_positive_rate.rationale: Plan assumes 10% baseline AI flag rate; Issue 3 sensitivity explicitly tests 12-15% FPR scenarios. High of 0.17 captures Expert Criticism stress that miscalibration overloads reviewers.

mandatory_override_fraction.rationale: Plan explicitly mandates a 15% human override watermark on all AI flags as a fixed compliance buffer; this is a policy parameter not subject to operational variance.
